title: [CS] Foundation
description:
The core mod filled with all the every ore/mineral we will use, while attempting to make them as compatible as can be with ForgeTags.

Don't you just hate when a mod has a steel ingot you cant use with another?
body:
# [CS] Library

[Mod Requirements]
For this mod to function you require Geckolib and Curios Api

## [Our thought process]
We are attempting to make our Library and other mods as inclusive as we can on our end, while outreaching to several different parts of the Modding Community with our different Mods 

This means our Library will house every ore/mineral we will use, while attempting to make them as compatible as can be with ForgeTags.
Don't you just hate when a mod has a steel ingot you cant use with another? 

We'll try to mitigate it as much as possible with our Mods but, there will obviously still be mishaps.
Here and there accidents happen in coding especially. 

Please report these bugs in our Discord Server<3

### Regarding notable features:
Autosmelt Enchantment
Most deepslate related ores, our mod and vanilla give double.
Crafting recipe for Cobwebs
Nether Wart blocks may be converted into usable Nether Wart
Overworld Quartz Ore
Made candles easily recolorable once dyed
Flint & Steel craftable with steel as well

#### Currently we have:
- Amber
- Brass
- Bauxite(Aluminium)
- Lead
- Magnesium
- Nickel
- Platinum
- Potassium & Sulfur (Gunpowder creation)
- Silver
- Tin
- Uranium
- Zinc
- Rose Gold
- Steel.
- Black Diamond
- Bloodstone
- Citrine
- Fluorite
- Jade
- Jasper
- Lithium
- Malachite
- Onyx
- Rose Quartz
- Ruby
- Sapphire
- Topaz



Join our Discord to also find out how to use most of our materials with ForgeTags for your own mod!
It'll make your time implementing custom tools much simpler, in the future we do plan to turn this into an actual API not just ForgeTags but as of now the project will remain closed source.
